chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 198 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of Main Case. 01-06-2023 Muhammad Raza Soomro (petitioner) present in person. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G a/w Dr. Rahmatullah Solangi, DHO, Khairpur. ***** Comments filed by respondent No.4 are taken on record and copy whereof is supplied to the petitioner. As per comments filed by responded No.5, there is shortage of Dermatologist, Ophthalmologist, Orthopedic Surgeon, General Surgeon, Physician and Gynecologist in T.H.Q Hospital Kotdiji and patients are being referred to Civil Hospital, Khairpur. Such comments of respondent No.4 show that Taluka Hospital, Kotdiji is facing acute shortage of doctors causing hardships to the patients especially women and children. Hence, Secretary, Health Department, Government of Sindh is directed to take serious note of above deficiency of doctors and post, within 30-days hereof, Dermatologist, Ophthalmologist, Orthopedic Surgeon, General Surgeon, Physician and Gynecologist in T.H.Q Hospital Kotdiji, currently operating three units i.e. Main building T.H.Q Hospital Kotdiji New Building T.H.Q Hospital Kotdiji and City Branch T.H.Q Hospital Kotdiji. Adjourned to 06.07.2023. Office is directed to supply copy of this order to learned AAG for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
